home.welcome_subtitle: Manage your Kiro IDE accounts, switch with one click, develop efficiently
home.tip_account_management: Click "Account Management" on the left to view and manage all accounts
home.tip_switch_account: Click the power icon on the account card to quickly switch accounts
home.tip_token_refresh: Token will automatically refresh 5 minutes before expiration, no manual action needed
home.tip_privacy_mode: Use "Privacy Mode" to hide email and account information
home.machine_id_description: Modify device identifiers, auto-switch when changing accounts, supports account binding
home.group_management_description: Batch set groups after multi-selecting accounts, move accounts with one click
home.tag_management_description: Batch add/remove tags after multi-selecting accounts, supports multiple tags

accounts.check_account_info: Check account info (usage, subscription, ban status)
accounts.add_first_account: Add your first account to get started

accounts.confirm_delete_multiple: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} accounts?

settings.confirm_reset: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to default?

machine_id.machine_id_bound: Machine ID bound to account successfully
machine_id.machine_id_unbound: Machine ID unbound from account successfully

auto_register.auto_register_description: Automatically register Builder ID accounts from a queued email list.
auto_register.outlook_detected: Detected Outlook email, activating first (without proxy)...
auto_register.step_1_launch_browser: Step 1: Launching browser, accessing Outlook activation page...
auto_register.outlook_activation_warning: Outlook activation may not be complete
auto_register.name: Name
auto_register.step_2_launch_browser: Step 2: Launching browser, entering registration page...
auto_register.second_skip_not_found: Second skip link not found, may have skipped this step
auto_register.step_8_cancel_key_creation: Step 8: Clicking cancel button (skip key creation)...
auto_register.stop_first: Stop the running task before importing.
auto_register.no_outlook_accounts: No Outlook accounts in the queue.
auto_register.format_description: One line per account: email|password|refreshToken|clientId (fields after email optional)
auto_register.password_desc: Password — used for signup when empty token.
auto_register.refresh_token_desc: Refresh token — optional for new registrations.
auto_register.duplicate_detection_desc: Emails already in the manager are marked and skipped.
auto_register.batch_concurrency_desc: Higher is faster but may hit rate limits.
auto_register.outlook_activation_desc: Some Outlook mailboxes must be activated before AWS signup.
auto_register.outlook_activation_step1: Use "Activate Outlook" for a batch activation run.
auto_register.outlook_activation_step2: Or enable "Skip activation" if not needed.
auto_register.instruction_6: If automation fails on first run, install the Playwright browser.

about.description: Manage your Kiro IDE accounts, usage, and subscriptions
about.update_not_available: You are using the latest version

update_dialog.new_version_message: A new version is available. Update now to get the latest features and fixes.
update_dialog.do_not_close: Please do not close the app...

settings_page.batch_import_not_supported: Batch import is not supported on Settings page. Please use Account Management page.
settings_page.only_json_supported: Settings page only supports JSON import. Please use Account Management for CSV/TXT import.
settings_page.confirm_clear_data_1: Are you sure you want to clear all account data? This action cannot be undone!
settings_page.confirm_clear_data_2: Confirm again: this will delete all accounts, groups, and tags!
settings_page.input_server_and_password: Please enter server URL and password
settings_page.configure_server_first: Please configure and test server connection first
settings_page.confirm_import_to_server: Are you sure you want to import {{count}} accounts to the server?
settings_page.hide_sensitive_info: Hide email and sensitive account information
settings_page.auto_refresh_desc: Automatically refresh token before expiration and sync account info
settings_page.auto_refresh_tip_1: - Auto refresh when token is close to expiration to keep login active
settings_page.auto_refresh_tip_2: - Auto sync account usage and subscription after refresh
settings_page.auto_refresh_tip_3: - When auto-switch is enabled, all account balances are checked regularly
settings_page.refresh_concurrency_desc: Number of accounts refreshed at the same time; too high may cause lag
settings_page.check_interval_desc: How often to check account status
settings_page.proxy_desc: All network requests will go through the proxy server
settings_page.auto_switch_desc: Automatically switch to another available account when balance is low
settings_page.balance_threshold_desc: Automatically switch when balance is below this value
settings_page.concurrency_desc: Number of accounts validated at the same time; too high may trigger API rate limiting
settings_page.concurrency_tip: Recommended range: 10-100. Too high may cause many validation failures; too low slows import speed.
settings_page.machine_id_manage_desc: Change device identifier, auto-change on account switch, and account machine ID binding
settings_page.machine_id_manage_hint: Please configure this in the Machine ID sidebar page
settings_page.kiro_server_import_desc: Batch import local accounts into Kiro server account pool for sharing
settings_page.import_to_server_desc: Import {{count}} accounts into server account pool
settings_page.export_data_desc: Supports JSON, TXT, CSV, clipboard and more
settings_page.import_data_desc: Import account data from JSON file
settings_page.clear_all_data_desc: Delete all accounts, groups and tags

kiro_settings_page.title: Kiro Settings
kiro_settings_page.subtitle: Manage Kiro IDE configuration, MCP servers, and user rules
kiro_settings_page.confirm_delete_file: Are you sure you want to delete "{{filename}}"? This action cannot be undone.
kiro_settings_page.confirm_delete_server: Are you sure you want to delete MCP server "{{name}}"?
kiro_settings_page.agent_autonomy_desc: Control whether Agent executes automatically or requires confirmation
kiro_settings_page.model_selection_desc: Select the AI model used by Agent
kiro_settings_page.usage_summary_desc: Show Agent execution time and usage
kiro_settings_page.code_references_desc: Allow generation with public code references
kiro_settings_page.codebase_indexing_desc: Enable codebase indexing for better search performance
kiro_settings_page.debug_logs_desc: Show debug logs in output panel
kiro_settings_page.enable_mcp_desc: Allow connection to external tools and data sources
kiro_settings_page.steering_desc: Steering files define AI assistant behavior rules and context
kiro_settings_page.trusted_commands_desc: These commands run automatically without confirmation
kiro_settings_page.denied_commands_desc: These commands always require manual confirmation

export_dialog.txt_desc_with_credentials: Importable format: email, token, nickname, login method
export_dialog.txt_desc: Plain text format, one account per line
export_dialog.include_credentials_desc: Includes sensitive data like token, usable for full import

machine_id_page.title: Machine ID Management
machine_id_page.subtitle: Manage device identifiers to avoid account linking and bans
machine_id_page.admin_required_desc: Changing machine ID requires running the app as administrator
machine_id_page.auto_backup_hint: Original value will be auto-backed up when machine ID is modified for the first time
machine_id_page.generate_random_desc: Generate UUID format machine ID with one click
machine_id_page.auto_switch_on_account_change: Auto-change machine ID when switching accounts
machine_id_page.auto_switch_on_account_change_desc: Generate and apply a new machine ID on each account switch
machine_id_page.account_machine_id_binding_desc: Assign a unique machine ID to each account and use it when switching
machine_id_page.use_bound_machine_id_desc: When disabled, each switch generates a random machine ID
machine_id_page.account_machine_id_management_desc: View and manage machine IDs bound to each account
machine_id_page.tip_auto_apply: Tip: after binding machine ID, switching to that account will auto-apply the corresponding machine ID
machine_id_page.change_history_hint: Machine ID changes will be recorded automatically
machine_id_page.windows_note: Modifies registry MachineGuid, administrator permission required
machine_id_page.macos_note: App-level override; native hardware UUID cannot be changed
machine_id_page.warning_note: Changing machine ID may affect authorization of some software, proceed with caution
